jobs.title: Software Developer (m/f/d)
jobs.description:
## Firmenbeschreibung

Zucchetti ist mit mehr als 9.000 Mitarbeitenden eines der größten IT-Unternehmen Europas. Zucchetti bietet Software, Hardware und IT-Dienstleistungen für Unternehmen, die sich einen erheblichen Wettbewerbsvorteil sichern und sich für alle IT-Fragen auf einen einzigen Ansprechpartner verlassen wollen.

Zurzeit verlassen sich weltweit bereits mehr als 700.000 Kunden auf unsere Services. In der Region D-A-CH bietet Zucchetti seinen Kunden ein Portfolio aus Hard- und Software für die Bereiche POS, ERP, HR-Management und Zutrittskontrolle übergreifend für verschiedene Branchen.

## Stellenbeschreibung

Are you passionate about coding and solving complex problems? Do you want to work in an international, innovative environment?

We’re seeking a talented Software Developer to join our Zucchetti Switzerland team. You’ll play a key role in developing and maintaining our Zucchetti products, tackling projects that shape the future of our products.

Location:

Workplace will be our office in Mendrisio (CH)

Your responsibilities:

- Develop, engineer and integrate components
- Follow user experience guidelines
- Demonstrate a thorough understanding of known security vulnerabilities and address them through the consistent application of security-by-design principles.
- Shape documentation
- Provide advanced, component technical support
- Resolve issues prior to and following testing

Tech stack:

- .NET 8 / .NET Core
- C#
- ASP.NET Core (Web APIs, services)
- Microsoft SQL Server, T-SQL, Oracle, Postgres
- Desktop applications (WPF / WinForms – POS environments)
- REST APIs & system integrations
- Git, CI/CD, Azure devops
- Visual Studio

## Anforderungsprofil

- BA in computer science or equivalent combination of technical education
- 3 years of experience in same role
- Express the knowledge of programming design principles with Microsoft technology or solid skills with similar technology stacks
- Demonstrate solid knowledge of code quality assurance principles and practices
- Analyze software defects and perform effective debugging and root-cause analysis
- Ability to define, interpret, and contribute to technical requirements and software design
- Actively monitor and evaluate emerging technologies and industry trends
- Work within tight deadlines while exhibiting exemplary time management and task prioritization
- Ability to analyze problems in order to identify the causes and successfully develop solutions
- Possess strong analytical skills and clear, effective communication abilities
- Demonstrate good team spirit
- Possess very good written and verbal skills in English, other languages are optional

Desirable Skills:

- Preferred Microsoft certifications
- Experience in API design and development
- Experience with web services development (REST) in modern frameworks (preferably in C# with .NET)
- Knowledge of Azure and cloud technologies

## Sonstige Informationen

We offer:

- Opportunity to gain international business experience
- Learning path to improve your hard and soft skills
- Full-time job, with flexible working hours and informal environment
- Hybrid work environment
- Comfortable, friendly and supportive working atmosphere
- Possibility for personal and professional growth within a stable environment
